subject: Standardize the pap pod/service name.
commit_message:
Standardize the pap pod/service name.

To fix the bug with connecting to the pap by pdp.

Change-Id: I21fb90f151ecace5c10e4def190ed15b15d7c4e5
Issue-ID: OOM-2333
Signed-off-by: Krystian Kedron <k.kedron@partner.samsung.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 2 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

This is the first proposition of solving the https://jira.onap.org/browse/OOM-2333 issue.
Set Work In Progress
